sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this sim-strategy god game

special_mechanics.name: terrain_manipulation
special_mechanics.description: Core mechanic - player raises and lowers land to create flat areas for followers to build on, also used to remove terrain from enemy positions

special_mechanics.name: follower_pathfinding
special_mechanics.description: Followers (peeps) wander landscapes and automatically build houses on flat land; they stop at barriers like water

special_mechanics.name: divine_powers
special_mechanics.description: Powers unlock with mana progression, include earthquakes, floods, swamps, volcanoes; followers can be upgraded to knights

tier_notes: Tier 2: Populous is a simulation/strategy god game rather than action platformer. Wikipedia source provides game design documentation and mechanics overview but contains no specific movement physics values, sub-pixel data, jump parameters, or gravity constants. The game focuses on terrain manipulation and follower AI rather than player character movement. No quantifiable physics parameters are documented in available sources.
